text.message: Sry, just thought it was the best for me as i cant Get wheat/brick
But I got plowed and then blocked and robbed first orbit?
we're all even for now, no bad blood
We are clearly not even, after me getting plowed I can fairly say I am the player with worse game
It doesn’t matter, you still don’t rob and block last place
all of us had the same amount of points at that point
Come on, look at the board
One person already has a city, the other has an expansion
wasn't the case at the time of the block
Even if all had 2 points, still you have to block the guy with a 659 and having a city next
Black can play road and army
Not answering cuz you have to block and rob blue
And the block is the 5 ore or the 9 wood
or me, I don't even have a port
why do you think I'm ahead of blue?
Brother he can be on 8 here
you have at least two non-knights
I can't take army, but I can try to take road
I can take the road next turn if you help me all
I'm offering to take the road
if you're not interested, It's fine by me
why would you give to blue if you are taking road anyway?
